california_schools:
CREATE TABLE frpm (
    CDSCode text, -- example: ['01100170109835', '01100170112607']
    `Academic Year` text, -- example: ['2014-2015']
    `County Code` text, -- example: ['01', '02']
    `District Code` integer, -- example: [10017, 31609]
    `School Code` text, -- example: ['0109835', '0112607']
    `County Name` text, -- example: ['Alameda', 'Alpine']
    `District Name` text, -- example: ['Alameda County Office of Education', 'California School for the Blind (State S']
    `School Name` text, -- example: ['FAME Public Charter', 'Envision Academy for Arts & Technology']
    `District Type` text, -- example: ['County Office of Education (COE)', 'State Special Schools']
    `School Type` text, -- example: ['K-12 Schools (Public)', 'High Schools (Public)']
    `Educational Option Type` text, -- example: ['Traditional', 'Juvenile Court School']
    `NSLP Provision Status` text, -- example: ['Breakfast Provision 2', 'Provision 2']
    `Charter School (Y/N)` integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    `Charter School Number` text, -- example: ['1500', '0728', '0811']
    `Charter Funding Type` text, -- example: ['Directly funded', 'Locally funded']
    IRC integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    `Low Grade` text, -- example: ['K', '9']
    `High Grade` text, -- example: ['12', '8']
    `Enrollment (K-12)` real, -- example: [1087.0, 395.0]
    `Free Meal Count (K-12)` real, -- example: [565.0, 186.0]
    `Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` real, -- example: [0.519779208831647, 0.470886075949367]
    `FRPM Count (K-12)` real, -- example: [715.0, 186.0]
    `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` real, -- example: [0.657773689052438, 0.470886075949367]
    `Enrollment (Ages 5-17)` real, -- example: [1070.0, 376.0]
    `Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)` real, -- example: [553.0, 182.0]
    `Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)` real, -- example: [0.516822429906542, 0.484042553191489]
    `FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` real, -- example: [702.0, 182.0]
    `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)` real, -- example: [0.65607476635514, 0.484042553191489]
    `2013-14 CALPADS Fall 1 Certification Status` integer, -- example: [1]
    PRIMARY KEY (CDSCode),
    CONSTRAINT fk_frpm_cdscode FOREIGN KEY (CDSCode) REFERENCES schools (CDSCode)
);

CREATE TABLE satscores (
    cds text, -- example: ['10101080000000', '10101080109991']
    rtype text, -- example: ['S', 'D']
    sname text, -- school name, example: ['FAME Public Charter', 'Envision Academy for Arts & Technology']
    dname text, -- district name, example: ['Alameda County Office of Education', 'Alameda Unified']
    cname text, -- county name, example: ['Alameda', 'Amador']
    enroll12 integer, -- enrollment (1st-12nd grade), example: [398, 62]
    NumTstTakr integer, -- Number of Test Takers, example: ['1500', 88, 17]
    AvgScrRead integer, -- average scores in Reading, example: [418, 503]
    AvgScrMath integer, -- average scores in Math, example: [418, 546]
    AvgScrWrite integer, -- average scores in writing, example: [417, 505]
    NumGE1500 integer, -- Number of Test Takers Whose Total SAT Scores Are Greater or Equal to 1500, example: [14, 9]
    PRIMARY KEY (cds),
    CONSTRAINT fk_satscores_cds FOREIGN KEY (cds) REFERENCES schools (CDSCode)
);

CREATE TABLE schools (
    CDSCode text, -- example: ['01100170000000', '01100170109835']
    NCESDist text, -- National Center for Educational Statistics school district identification number, example: ['0691051', '0600002']
    NCESSchool text, -- National Center for Educational Statistics school identification number, example: ['10546', '10947']
    StatusType text, -- example: ['Active', 'Closed']
    County text, -- example: ['Alameda', 'Alpine']
    District text, -- example: ['Alameda County Office of Education', 'California School for the Blind (State S']
    School text, -- example: ['FAME Public Charter', 'Envision Academy for Arts & Technology']
    Street text, -- example: ['313 West Winton Avenue', '39899 Balentine Drive, Suite 335']
    StreetAbr text, -- street address, example: ['313 West Winton Ave.', '39899 Balentine Dr., Ste. 335']
    City text, -- example: ['Hayward', 'Newark']
    Zip text, -- example: ['94544-1136', '94560-5359']
    State text, -- example: ['CA']
    MailStreet text, -- example: ['313 West Winton Avenue', '39899 Balentine Drive, Suite 335']
    MailStrAbr text, -- mailing street address, example: ['313 West Winton Ave.', '39899 Balentine Dr., Ste. 335']
    MailCity text, -- mailing city, example: ['Hayward', 'Newark']
    MailZip text, -- mailing zip, example: ['94544-1136', '94560-5359']
    MailState text, -- mailing state, example: ['CA']
    Phone text, -- example: ['(510) 887-0152', '(510) 596-8901']
    Ext text, -- extension, example: ['1500', '130', '1240']
    Website text, -- example: ['www.acoe.org', 'www.envisionacademy.org/']
    OpenDate date, -- example: ['2005-08-29', '2006-08-28']
    ClosedDate date, -- example: ['2015-07-31', '2015-06-30']
    Charter integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    CharterNum text, -- example: ['1500', '0728', '0811']
    FundingType text, -- example: ['Directly funded', 'Locally funded']
    DOC text, -- District Ownership Code, example: ['00', '31']
    DOCType text, -- The District Ownership Code Type, example: ['County Office of Education (COE)', 'State Special Schools']
    SOC text, -- School Ownership Code, example: ['65', '66']
    SOCType text, -- School Ownership Code Type, example: ['K-12 Schools (Public)', 'High Schools (Public)']
    EdOpsCode text, -- Education Option Code, example: ['TRAD', 'JUV']
    EdOpsName text, -- Educational Option Name, example: ['Traditional', 'Juvenile Court School']
    EILCode text, -- Educational Instruction Level Code, example: ['ELEMHIGH', 'HS']
    EILName text, -- Educational Instruction Level Name, example: ['Elementary-High Combination', 'High School']
    GSoffered text, -- grade span offered, example: ['K-12', '9-12']
    GSserved text, -- grade span served., example: ['K-12', '9-12']
    Virtual text, -- example: ['P', 'N']
    Magnet integer, -- example: [0, 1]
    Latitude real, -- example: [37.658212, 37.521436]
    Longitude real, -- example: [-122.09713, -121.99391]
    AdmFName1 text, -- administrator's first name 1, example: ['L Karen', 'Laura']
    AdmLName1 text, -- administrator's last name 1, example: ['Monroe', 'Robell']
    AdmEmail1 text, -- administrator's email address 1, example: ['lkmonroe@acoe.org', 'laura@envisionacademy.org']
    AdmFName2 text, -- administrator's first name 2, example: ['Sau-Lim (Lance)', 'Jennifer']
    AdmLName2 text, -- administrator's last name 2, example: ['Administrator', 'Tsang', 'Koelling']
    AdmEmail2 text, -- administrator's email address 2, example: ['stsang@unityhigh.org', 'jkoelling@efcps.net']
    AdmFName3 text, -- administrator's first name 3, example: ['Drew', 'Irma']
    AdmLName3 text, -- administrator's last name 3, example: ['Sarratore', 'Munoz']
    AdmEmail3 text, -- administrator's email address 3, example: ['dsarratore@vincentacademy.org', 'gmunoz@piedmont.k12.ca.us']
    LastUpdate date, -- example: ['2015-06-23', '2015-09-01']
    PRIMARY KEY (CDSCode)
);
financial:
CREATE TABLE account (
    account_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    district_id integer, -- location of branch, example: [18, 1]
    frequency text, -- example: ['POPLATEK MESICNE', 'POPLATEK TYDNE']
    `date` date, -- example: ['1995-03-24', '1993-02-26']
    PRIMARY KEY (account_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_account_district_id FOREIGN KEY (district_id) REFERENCES district (district_id)
);

CREATE TABLE card (
    card_id integer, -- credit card id, example: [1, 2]
    disp_id integer, -- disposition id, example: [9, 19]
    type text, -- example: ['gold', 'classic']
    issued date, -- example: ['1998-10-16', '1998-03-13']
    PRIMARY KEY (card_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_card_disp_id FOREIGN KEY (disp_id) REFERENCES disp (disp_id)
);

CREATE TABLE client (
    client_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    gender text, -- example: ['F', 'M']
    birth_date date, -- example: ['1970-12-13', '1945-02-04']
    district_id integer, -- location of branch, example: [18, 1]
    PRIMARY KEY (client_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_client_district_id FOREIGN KEY (district_id) REFERENCES district (district_id)
);

CREATE TABLE disp (
    disp_id integer, -- disposition id, example: [1, 2]
    client_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    account_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    type text, -- example: ['OWNER', 'DISPONENT']
    PRIMARY KEY (disp_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_disp_client_id FOREIGN KEY (client_id) REFERENCES client (client_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_disp_account_id FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES account (account_id)
);

CREATE TABLE district (
    district_id integer, -- location of branch, example: [1, 2]
    A2 text, -- district_name, example: ['Hl.m. Praha', 'Benesov']
    A3 text, -- region, example: ['Prague', 'central Bohemia']
    A4 text, -- number of inhabitants, example: ['1204953', '88884']
    A5 text, -- no. of municipalities with inhabitants < 499, example: ['0', '80']
    A6 text, -- no. of municipalities with inhabitants 500-1999, example: ['0', '26']
    A7 text, -- no. of municipalities with inhabitants 2000-9999, example: ['0', '6']
    A8 integer, -- no. of municipalities with inhabitants > 10000, example: [1, 2]
    A9 integer, -- example: [1, 5]
    A10 real, -- ratio of urban inhabitants, example: [100.0, 46.7]
    A11 integer, -- average salary, example: [12541, 8507]
    A12 real, -- unemployment rate 1995, example: [0.2, 1.6]
    A13 real, -- unemployment rate 1996, example: [0.43, 1.85]
    A14 integer, -- no. of entrepreneurs per 1000 inhabitants, example: [167, 132]
    A15 integer, -- no. of committed crimes 1995, example: [85677, 2159]
    A16 integer, -- no. of committed crimes 1996, example: [99107, 2674]
    PRIMARY KEY (district_id)
);

CREATE TABLE loan (
    loan_id integer, -- example: [4959, 4961]
    account_id integer, -- example: [2, 19]
    `date` date, -- example: ['1994-01-05', '1996-04-29']
    amount integer, -- example: [80952, 30276]
    duration integer, -- example: [24, 12]
    payments real, -- monthly payments, example: [3373.0, 2523.0]
    status text, -- example: ['A', 'B']
    PRIMARY KEY (loan_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_loan_account_id FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES account (account_id)
);

CREATE TABLE `order` (
    order_id integer, -- example: [29401, 29402]
    account_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    bank_to text, -- bank of the recipient, example: ['YZ', 'ST']
    account_to integer, -- account of the recipient, example: [87144583, 89597016]
    amount real, -- debited amount, example: [2452.0, 3372.7]
    k_symbol text, -- characterization of the payment, example: ['SIPO', 'UVER']
    PRIMARY KEY (order_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_order_account_id FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES account (account_id)
);

CREATE TABLE trans (
    trans_id integer, -- transaction id, example: [1, 5]
    account_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    `date` date, -- date of transaction, example: ['1995-03-24', '1995-04-13']
    type text, -- +/- transaction, example: ['PRIJEM', 'VYDAJ']
    operation text, -- mode of transaction, example: ['VKLAD', 'PREVOD Z UCTU']
    amount integer, -- amount of money, example: [1000, 3679]
    balance integer, -- balance after transaction, example: [1000, 4679]
    k_symbol text, -- characterization of the transaction, example: ['SIPO', 'SLUZBY']
    bank text, -- bank of the partner, example: ['AB', 'YZ']
    account integer, -- account of the partner, example: [41403269, 87144583]
    PRIMARY KEY (trans_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_trans_account_id FOREIGN KEY (account_id) REFERENCES account (account_id)
);
toxicology:
CREATE TABLE atom (
    atom_id text, -- example: ['TR000_1', 'TR000_2']
    molecule_id text, -- example: ['TR000', 'TR001']
    element text, -- example: ['o', 'cl', 'c']
    PRIMARY KEY (atom_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_atom_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY (molecule_id) REFERENCES molecule (molecule_id)
);

CREATE TABLE bond (
    bond_id text, -- example: ['TR000_1_2', 'TR000_2_3']
    molecule_id text, -- example: ['TR000', 'TR001']
    bond_type text, -- example: ['-', '=']
    PRIMARY KEY (bond_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_bond_molecule_id FOREIGN KEY (molecule_id) REFERENCES molecule (molecule_id)
);

CREATE TABLE connected (
    atom_id text, -- example: ['TR000_1', 'TR000_2']
    atom_id2 text, -- atom id 2, example: ['TR000_2', 'TR000_1']
    bond_id text, -- example: ['TR000_1_2', 'TR000_2_3']
    PRIMARY KEY (atom_id, atom_id2),
    CONSTRAINT fk_connected_atom_id FOREIGN KEY (atom_id) REFERENCES atom (atom_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_connected_atom_id2 FOREIGN KEY (atom_id2) REFERENCES atom (atom_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_connected_bond_id FOREIGN KEY (bond_id) REFERENCES bond (bond_id)
);

CREATE TABLE molecule (
    molecule_id text, -- example: ['TR000', 'TR001']
    label text, -- example: ['+', '-']
    PRIMARY KEY (molecule_id)
);

codebase_community:

CREATE TABLE alignment (
    id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    alignment text, -- example: ['Good', 'Bad']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE attribute (
    id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    attribute_name text, -- example: ['Power', 'Intelligence', 'Strength']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE colour (
    id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    colour text, -- example: ['No Colour', 'Amber']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE gender (
    id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    gender text, -- example: ['Male', 'Female']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE publisher (
    id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    publisher_name text, -- example: ['ABC Studios', 'Dark Horse Comics']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE race (
    id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    race text, -- example: ['-', 'Alien']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE superhero (
    id integer, -- example: ['80', 1, 2]
    superhero_name text, -- example: ['3-D Man', 'A-Bomb']
    full_name text, -- example: ['Charles Chandler', 'Richard Milhouse Jones']
    gender_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    eye_colour_id integer, -- example: [9, 33]
    hair_colour_id integer, -- example: [13, 1]
    skin_colour_id integer, -- example: [1, 7]
    race_id integer, -- example: [1, 24]
    publisher_id integer, -- example: [13, 3]
    alignment_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    height_cm integer, -- example: [188, 203]
    weight_kg integer, -- example: ['80', 90, 441]
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_gender_id FOREIGN KEY (gender_id) REFERENCES gender (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_eye_colour_id FOREIGN KEY (eye_colour_id) REFERENCES colour (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_hair_colour_id FOREIGN KEY (hair_colour_id) REFERENCES colour (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_skin_colour_id FOREIGN KEY (skin_colour_id) REFERENCES colour (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_race_id FOREIGN KEY (race_id) REFERENCES race (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY (publisher_id) REFERENCES publisher (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_superhero_alignment_id FOREIGN KEY (alignment_id) REFERENCES alignment (id)
);

CREATE TABLE hero_attribute (
    hero_id integer, -- example: ['80', 1, 2]
    attribute_id integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    attribute_value integer, -- example: ['80', 80, 75]
    CONSTRAINT fk_hero_attribute_hero_id FOREIGN KEY (hero_id) REFERENCES superhero (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_hero_attribute_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY (attribute_id) REFERENCES attribute (id)
);

CREATE TABLE superpower (
    id integer, -- example: ['80', 1, 2]
    power_name text, -- example: ['Agility', 'Accelerated Healing']
    PRIMARY KEY (id)
);

CREATE TABLE hero_power (
    hero_id integer, -- example: ['80', 1, 2]
    power_id integer, -- example: ['80', 1, 18]
    CONSTRAINT fk_hero_power_hero_id FOREIGN KEY (hero_id) REFERENCES superhero (id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_hero_power_power_id FOREIGN KEY (power_id) REFERENCES superpower (id)
);
formula_1:
CREATE TABLE circuits (
    circuitId integer, -- example: [23, 61]
    circuitRef text, -- circuit reference name, example: ['sepang', 'bahrain']
    name text, -- example: ['Sepang International Circuit', 'Bahrain International Circuit']
    location text, -- example: ['Kuala Lumpur', 'Sakhir']
    country text, -- example: ['Italy', 'Malaysia', 'Bahrain']
    lat real, -- latitude, example: [2.76083, 26.0325]
    lng real, -- longitude, example: [101.738, 50.5106]
    alt integer,
    url text, -- example: ['http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/A1-Ring', 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/AVUS']
    PRIMARY KEY (circuitId)
);

CREATE TABLE constructors (
    constructorId integer, -- example: [147, 39]
    constructorRef text, -- Constructor Reference name, example: ['mclaren', 'bmw_sauber']
    name text, -- example: ['AFM', 'AGS']
    nationality text, -- example: ['British', 'German']
    url text, -- example: ['http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/McLaren', 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/BMW_Sauber']
    PRIMARY KEY (constructorId)
);

CREATE TABLE drivers (
    driverId integer, -- example: [452, 625]
    driverRef text, -- driver reference name, example: ['hamilton', 'heidfeld']
    number integer, -- example: [44, 6]
    code text, -- example: ['HAM', 'HEI']
    forename text, -- example: ['Lewis', 'Nick']
    surname text, -- example: ['Hamilton', 'Heidfeld']
    dob date, -- date of birth, example: ['1985-01-07', '1977-05-10']
    nationality text, -- example: ['British', 'German']
    url text, -- example: ['http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C3%89lie_B', 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/%C3%89ric_B']
    PRIMARY KEY (driverId)
);

CREATE TABLE seasons (
    `year` integer, -- race ID, example: [1950, 1951]
    url text, -- example: ['http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1950_Formul', 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1951_Formul']
    PRIMARY KEY (`year`)
);

CREATE TABLE races (
    raceId integer, -- example: [837, 833]
    `year` integer, -- example: [2009, 2008]
    round integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    circuitId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    name text, -- example: ['Australian Grand Prix', 'Malaysian Grand Prix']
    `date` date, -- example: ['2009-03-29', '2009-04-05']
    `time` text, -- example: ['06:00:00', '09:00:00']
    url text, -- example: ['http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1950_Belgia', 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1950_Britis']
    PRIMARY KEY (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_races_year FOREIGN KEY (`year`) REFERENCES seasons (`year`),
    CONSTRAINT fk_races_circuitid FOREIGN KEY (circuitId) REFERENCES circuits (circuitId)
);

CREATE TABLE constructorResults (
    constructorResultsId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    raceId integer, -- example: [18, 19]
    constructorId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    points real, -- example: [14.0, 8.0]
    status text, -- example: ['D']
    PRIMARY KEY (constructorResultsId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_constructorresults_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_constructorresults_constructorid FOREIGN KEY (constructorId) REFERENCES constructors (constructorId)
);

CREATE TABLE constructorStandings (
    constructorStandingsId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    raceId integer, -- example: [18, 19]
    constructorId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    points real, -- example: [14.0, 8.0]
    `position` integer, -- example: [1, 3]
    positionText text, -- example: ['1', '3']
    wins integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    PRIMARY KEY (constructorStandingsId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_constructorstandings_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_constructorstandings_constructorid FOREIGN KEY (constructorId) REFERENCES constructors (constructorId)
);

CREATE TABLE driverStandings (
    driverStandingsId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    raceId integer, -- constructor Reference name, example: [18, 19]
    driverId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    points real, -- example: [10.0, 8.0]
    `position` integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    positionText text, -- example: ['1', '2']
    wins integer, -- example: [1, 0]
    PRIMARY KEY (driverStandingsId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_driverstandings_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_driverstandings_driverid FOREIGN KEY (driverId) REFERENCES drivers (driverId)
);

CREATE TABLE lapTimes (
    raceId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    driverId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    lap integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    `position` integer, -- example: [13, 12]
    `time` text, -- example: ['1:49.088', '1:33.740']
    milliseconds integer, -- example: [109088, 93740]
    PRIMARY KEY (raceId, driverId, lap),
    CONSTRAINT fk_laptimes_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_laptimes_driverid FOREIGN KEY (driverId) REFERENCES drivers (driverId)
);

CREATE TABLE pitStops (
    raceId integer, -- example: [841, 842]
    driverId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    stop integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    lap integer, -- example: [16, 36]
    `time` text, -- example: ['17:28:24', '17:59:29']
    duration text, -- example: ['23.227', '23.199']
    milliseconds integer, -- example: [23227, 23199]
    PRIMARY KEY (raceId, driverId, stop),
    CONSTRAINT fk_pitstops_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_pitstops_driverid FOREIGN KEY (driverId) REFERENCES drivers (driverId)
);

CREATE TABLE qualifying (
    qualifyId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    raceId integer, -- example: [18, 19]
    driverId integer, -- example: [1, 9]
    constructorId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    number integer, -- example: [22, 4]
    `position` integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    q1 text, -- qualifying 1, example: ['1:26.572', '1:26.103']
    q2 text, -- qualifying 2, example: ['1:25.187', '1:25.315']
    q3 text, -- qualifying 3, example: ['1:26.714', '1:26.869']
    PRIMARY KEY (qualifyId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_driverid FOREIGN KEY (driverId) REFERENCES drivers (driverId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_constructorid FOREIGN KEY (constructorId) REFERENCES constructors (constructorId)
);

CREATE TABLE status (
    statusId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    status text, -- example: ['Finished', 'Disqualified']
    PRIMARY KEY (statusId)
);

CREATE TABLE results (
    resultId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    raceId integer, -- example: [18, 19]
    driverId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    constructorId integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    number integer, -- example: [22, 3]
    grid integer, -- example: [1, 5]
    `position` integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    positionText text, -- example: ['1', '2']
    positionOrder integer, -- example: [1, 2]
    points real, -- example: [10.0, 8.0]
    laps integer, -- example: [58, 57]
    `time` text, -- example: ['1:34:50.616', '+5.478']
    milliseconds integer, -- example: [5690616, 5696094]
    fastestLap integer, -- example: [39, 41]
    rank integer, -- example: [2, 3]
    fastestLapTime text, -- example: ['1:27.452', '1:27.739']
    fastestLapSpeed text, -- example: ['218.300', '217.586']
    statusId integer, -- example: [1, 11]
    PRIMARY KEY (resultId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_results_raceid FOREIGN KEY (raceId) REFERENCES races (raceId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_results_driverid FOREIGN KEY (driverId) REFERENCES drivers (driverId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_results_constructorid FOREIGN KEY (constructorId) REFERENCES constructors (constructorId),
    CONSTRAINT fk_results_statusid FOREIGN KEY (statusId) REFERENCES status (statusId)
);

CREATE TABLE Examination (
    ID integer, -- example: [14872, 48473]
    `Examination Date` date, -- example: ['1997-05-27', '1992-12-21']
    `aCL IgG` real, -- anti-Cardiolipin antibody (IgG), example: [1.3, 4.3]
    `aCL IgM` real, -- anti-Cardiolipin antibody (IgM), example: [1.6, 4.6]
    ANA integer, -- anti-nucleus antibody, example: [256, 0]
    `ANA Pattern` text, -- pattern observed in the sheet of ANA examination, example: ['P', 'P,S']
    `aCL IgA` integer, -- anti-Cardiolipin antibody (IgA) concentration, example: ['14', '1', 0, 3]
    Diagnosis text, -- example: ['thrombosis', 'Normal', 'MCTD, AMI', 'SLE']
    KCT text, -- measure of degree of coagulation, example: ['-', '+']
    RVVT text, -- measure of degree of coagulation, example: ['-', '+']
    LAC text, -- measure of degree of coagulation, example: ['-', '+']
    Symptoms text, -- example: ['AMI', 'CNS lupus']
    Thrombosis integer, -- example: ['1', 1, 0]
    CONSTRAINT fk_examination_id FOREIGN KEY (ID) REFERENCES Patient (ID)
);

CREATE TABLE Patient (
    ID integer, -- example: [2110, 11408]
    SEX text, -- example: ['F', 'M']
    Birthday date, -- example: ['1934-02-13', '1937-05-02']
    Description date, -- example: ['1994-02-14', '1996-12-01']
    `First Date` date, -- example: ['1993-02-10', '1973-01-01']
    Admission text, -- example: ['+', '-']
    Diagnosis text, -- example: ['RA susp.', 'PSS']
    PRIMARY KEY (ID)
);

CREATE TABLE Laboratory (
    ID integer, -- example: [27654, 30609]
    `Date` date, -- example: ['1991-09-11', '1991-09-17']
    GOT integer, -- AST glutamic oxaloacetic transaminase, example: ['14', 34, 29]
    GPT integer, -- ALT glutamic pyruvic transaminase, example: ['14', '1', 36, 31]
    LDH integer, -- lactate dehydrogenase, example: [567, 579]
    ALP integer, -- alkaliphophatase, example: [166, 154]
    TP real, -- total protein, example: [4.5, 5.1]
    ALB real, -- albumin, example: [3.3, 3.4]
    UA real, -- uric acid, example: [3.8, 4.2]
    UN integer, -- urea nitrogen, example: ['14', 29, 36]
    CRE real, -- creatinine, example: [0.8, 0.9]
    `T-BIL` real, -- total bilirubin, example: [0.3, 0.2]
    `T-CHO` integer, -- total cholesterol, example: [165, 134]
    TG integer, -- triglyceride, example: [185, 205]
    CPK integer, -- creatinine phosphokinase, example: ['14', '1', 9, 10]
    GLU integer, -- blood glucose, example: [88, 134]
    WBC real, -- White blood cell, example: [5.0, 10.4]
    RBC real, -- Red blood cell, example: [2.6, 2.9]
    HGB real, -- Hemoglobin, example: [6.4, 6.7]
    HCT real, -- Hematoclit, example: [20.3, 21.6]
    PLT integer, -- platelet, example: [227, 242]
    PT real, -- prothrombin time, example: [11.3, 12.0]
    APTT integer, -- activated partial prothrombin time, example: [108, 84]
    FG real, -- fibrinogen, example: [27.0, 38.6]
    PIC integer, -- example: [320, 513]
    TAT integer, -- example: [77, 108]
    TAT2 integer, -- example: [113, 88]
    `U-PRO` text, -- proteinuria, example: ['2', '-', '0']
    IGG integer, -- example: [339, 771]
    IGA integer, -- example: ['1', 145, 188]
    IGM integer, -- example: [46, 132]
    CRP text, -- C-reactive protein, example: ['1', '0.6', '2.7']
    RA text, -- Rhuematoid Factor, example: ['-', '+']
    RF text, -- RAHA, example: ['14', '<20.5', '<20.8']
    C3 integer, -- complement 3, example: [30, 82]
    C4 integer, -- complement 4, example: ['14', 14, 26]
    RNP text, -- anti-ribonuclear protein, example: ['1', '0']
    SM text, -- anti-SM, example: ['1', '0']
    SC170 text, -- anti-scl70, example: ['1', '16']
    SSA text, -- anti-SSA, example: ['1', '0', 'negative']
    SSB text, -- anti-SSB, example: ['0', 'negative']
    CENTROMEA text, -- anti-centromere, example: ['0', 'negative']
    DNA text, -- anti-DNA, example: ['41.9', '18']
    `DNA-II` integer, -- anti-DNA
    PRIMARY KEY (ID, `Date`),
    CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_id FOREIGN KEY (ID) REFERENCES Patient (ID)
);

CREATE TABLE event (
    event_id text, -- example: ['rec0Si5cQ4rJRVzd6', 'rec0akZnLLpGUloLH']
    event_name text, -- example: ['March Meeting', 'Officers meeting - January']
    event_date text, -- example: ['2020-03-10T12:00:00', '2020-01-14T09:30:00']
    type text, -- example: ['Meeting', 'Election']
    notes text, -- example: ['All active members can vote for new offi', "Attend Women's soccer game as a group."]
    location text, -- example: ['MU 215', 'Campus Soccer/Lacrosse stadium']
    status text, -- example: ['Open', 'Planning']
    PRIMARY KEY (event_id)
);

CREATE TABLE major (
    major_id text, -- example: ['rec06DF6vZ1CyPKpc', 'rec09LedkREyskCNv']
    major_name text, -- example: ['Outdoor Product Design and Development', 'Agricultural Communication']
    department text, -- example: ['School of Applied Sciences, Technology a', 'Watershed Sciences Department']
    college text, -- example: ['College of Agriculture and Applied Scien', 'College of Natural Resources']
    PRIMARY KEY (major_id)
);

CREATE TABLE zip_code (
    zip_code integer, -- example: ['28092', 501, 544]
    type text, -- example: ['Unique', 'Standard']
    city text, -- example: ['Lincolnton', 'Carolina', 'Hometown', 'North', 'Holtsville', 'Adjuntas']
    county text, -- example: ['Carolina', 'Suffolk County', 'Adjuntas Municipio']
    state text, -- example: ['North Carolina', 'New York', 'Puerto Rico']
    short_state text, -- example: ['NY', 'PR']
    PRIMARY KEY (zip_code)
);

CREATE TABLE attendance (
    link_to_event text, -- example: ['rec2N69DMcrqN9PJC', 'rec5XDvJLyxDsGZWc']
    link_to_member text, -- example: ['recD078PnS3x2doBe', 'recP6DJPyi5donvXL']
    PRIMARY KEY (link_to_event, link_to_member),
    CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_link_to_event FOREIGN KEY (link_to_event) REFERENCES event (event_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_link_to_member FOREIGN KEY (link_to_member) REFERENCES member (member_id)
);

CREATE TABLE budget (
    budget_id text, -- example: ['rec0QmEc3cSQFQ6V2', 'rec1bG6HSft7XIvTP']
    category text, -- example: ['Advertisement', 'Food']
    spent real, -- example: [67.81, 121.14]
    remaining real, -- example: [7.19, 28.86]
    amount integer, -- example: [75, 150]
    event_status text, -- example: ['Closed', 'Open']
    link_to_event text, -- example: ['recI43CzsZ0Q625ma', 'recggMW2eyCYceNcy']
    PRIMARY KEY (budget_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_budget_link_to_event FOREIGN KEY (link_to_event) REFERENCES event (event_id)
);

CREATE TABLE expense (
    expense_id text, -- example: ['rec017x6R3hQqkLAo', 'rec1nIjoZKTYayqZ6']
    expense_description text, -- example: ['Post Cards, Posters', 'Water, Cookies']
    expense_date text, -- example: ['2019-08-20', '2019-10-08']
    cost real, -- example: [122.06, 20.2]
    approved text, -- example: ['true']
    link_to_member text, -- example: ['rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v', 'recro8T1MPMwRadVH']
    link_to_budget text, -- example: ['recvKTAWAFKkVNnXQ', 'recy8KY5bUdzF81vv']
    PRIMARY KEY (expense_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_expense_link_to_member FOREIGN KEY (link_to_member) REFERENCES member (member_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_expense_link_to_budget FOREIGN KEY (link_to_budget) REFERENCES budget (budget_id)
);

CREATE TABLE income (
    income_id text, -- example: ['rec0s9ZrO15zhzUeE', 'rec7f5XMQZexgtQJo']
    date_received text, -- example: ['2019-10-17', '2019-09-04']
    amount integer, -- example: [50, 200]
    source text, -- example: ['Dues', 'Fundraising']
    notes text, -- example: ['Secured donations to help pay for speake', 'Annual funding from Student Government.']
    link_to_member text, -- example: ['reccW7q1KkhSKZsea', 'recTjHY5xXhvkCdVT']
    PRIMARY KEY (income_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_income_link_to_member FOREIGN KEY (link_to_member) REFERENCES member (member_id)
);

CREATE TABLE member (
    member_id text, -- example: ['rec1x5zBFIqoOuPW8', 'rec280Sk7o31iG0Tx']
    first_name text, -- example: ['Angela', 'Grant']
    last_name text, -- example: ['Sanders', 'Gilmour']
    email text, -- example: ['angela.sanders@lpu.edu', 'grant.gilmour@lpu.edu']
    `position` text, -- example: ['Member', 'Inactive']
    t_shirt_size text, -- example: ['Medium', 'X-Large']
    phone text, -- example: ['(651) 928-4507', '403-555-1310']
    zip integer, -- example: ['28092', 55108, 29440]
    link_to_major text, -- example: ['recxK3MHQFbR9J5uO', 'rec7BxKpjJ7bNph3O']
    PRIMARY KEY (member_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_member_zip FOREIGN KEY (zip) REFERENCES zip_code (zip_code),
    CONSTRAINT fk_member_link_to_major FOREIGN KEY (link_to_major) REFERENCES major (major_id)
);
